desc:
f18v 特征描述

茎与花：主茎向上延伸，分枝处长有五个深绿色的“管状”或“壶状”花苞，顶部开口处边缘呈红色，形状类似张开的嘴唇。
叶片：生有两片巨大的、深绿色的羽状深裂叶，边缘呈波浪状起伏，形似某些蕨类植物的叶片。
根部：复杂的须根系。根部由一个浅黄色的圆柱状基座长出，下方延伸出数条相互缠绕、呈螺旋状下垂的浅色根须。

Stem & Flowers: Main stem extends upwards with five deep-green "tubular" or "jug-like" buds. The openings at the tips have red margins, resembling open lips.
Leaves: Two massive, deep-green pinnately lobed leaves with wavy margins, resembling the fronds of certain fern species.
Roots: Complex fibrous root system. Emerging from a pale-yellow cylindrical base, multiple intertwined, spiraling pale rootlets extend downwards.
